Very often it's technical analysis that comes in handy. We prepared technical ratings for Bitcoin / TetherUS (BTC): today its technical analysis shows the neutral signal, and according to the 1 week rating BTC shows the sell signal. And you'd better dig deeper and study 1 month rating too — it's neutral. Find inspiration in Bitcoin / TetherUS trading ideas and keep track of what's moving crypto markets with our crypto news feed.
